🔒 100% private — no upload

Convert PNG to JPG

Free, private, and instant — right in your browser.

Drag & drop your PNG files here

🔒 Converted in your browser. Nothing is uploaded.

PNG files can be large, especially for photos. Converting PNG to JPG shrinks the file size dramatically while keeping the image looking great — ideal for email, web pages, and sharing. Conversion happens in your browser, so your images stay private.

How to convert

  1. Drag your PNG images into the box above.
  2. Each is re-encoded as a compact JPG (transparency flattened to white).
  3. Download the JPG files.

FAQ

Why convert PNG to JPG?

JPG files are much smaller for photographs, which makes them faster to send and upload.

Related converters

JPG to PNGWEBP to JPG

VaultConvert — free file converters that run entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your device.
